Dec 16
Family Classics Book Club
6:00 PM - 7:00 PM Ages 6-12
Join us this month for 'The Family Under the Bridge' by Natalie Savage Carlson.
Dec 30
Build Our Mouse Mansion With Us!
6:00 PM - 7:00 PM Ages 4-12
Come help us build the furniture for our in-store Mouse Mansion to be a part of the fun! Build and paint little die-cut wooden furniture that will remain in the store for the community to see and play with.
Jan 2
Cut-and-Play Story and Craft Night
6:00 PM - 7:00 PM Ages 5-10
Cut out artistically rendered, articulating characters from a fairy tale to make the story come to life! Join Emily for crafting and stories using materials from artist Emma R-C.
Jan 20
Family Classics Book Club
6:00 PM - 7:00 PM Ages 6-12
Join us this month for 'The Phantom Tollbooth' by Norton Juster.
Jan 23
Hot Cocoa Pajama Party
6:30 PM - 8:00 PM Ages All ages
Wear cozy clothes, bring mats, a pillow, blankets, and your favorite winter stories to cuddle up and read with your friends and family.
Jan 31
Live Music with Congito Jaffe
2:00 PM Ages All ages
Join us for an afternoon including live music by our very own local singer-songwriter Congito Jaffe.
Feb 10
Valentine Craft Event
6:00 PM - 7:00 PM Ages All ages
Join us for a night of creativity to make Valentine's cards and boxes for your little loved ones. $10 per person to cover craft supplies.
Feb 19
Camp Sunshine Kids Yoga Pop-Up
5:00 PM - 6:45 PM Ages 0-7
Join Jena from Camp Sunshine Kids Yoga for a fun and mindful evening of yoga, music, games, and stories. Two sessions: Mommy & Me (ages 0-3) at 5 PM and Kids Yoga (ages 4-7) at 6 PM.
Feb 24
Family Classics Book Club
6:00 PM - 7:00 PM Ages 6-12
Join us this month for 'Dear Mr. Henshaw' by Beverly Cleary.
Feb 28
Winter Simple Portraits Pop Up
By appointment Ages All ages
Cozy, natural winter portraits by A Little Bit Perfect, hosted at The Wandering Lantern.
Mar 7
Learn to Play Chess Free
2:00 PM - 4:00 PM Ages All ages
A free chess afternoon for kids of all ages! Learn the game, practice with other kids, and join a mini tournament if you're feeling competitive.
Mar 12
Postcard Pen Pals $12
6:00 PM - 7:00 PM Ages All ages
Design, color, and create a stack of one-of-a-kind postcards, then get matched with your very own pen pal to keep the letters going! A crafting and writing event for all ages. $12 per person.
Mar 17
Family Classics Book Club
6:00 PM - 7:00 PM Ages 6-12
Join us this month for 'Pollyanna' by Eleanor H. Porter — a timeless story of optimism and joy that parents and kids can enjoy together.
Mar 21
Meet Matthew Swinehart & Nola the Noble Corgi!
11:00 AM & 11:30 AM Ages All ages
The book comes out March 10th — Nola arrives March 21st. Celebrate the brand-new release with author Matthew Swinehart and the real Nola, a certified therapy dog whose job is visiting hospital patients to bring them comfort and calm.
Apr 2
Once Upon a Dime
During Store Hours Ages All ages
Celebrate Children's Book Day with us! Select books priced at just 10 cents — only on Thursday, April 2nd.
Apr 3
Cardboard Maker's Space $12
6:00 PM - 8:00 PM Ages All ages
A night of creativity and invention! Design a robot, build an architectural structure, or create a piece of art — all out of cardboard. $12 per person for supplies.
Apr 4
Visit with the White Rabbit
11:00 AM - 2:00 PM Ages All ages
The White Rabbit is hopping into The Wandering Lantern the day before Easter. Storytime at 11, then stick around for photos with the guest of honor from 12 to 2.
Apr 11
Meet Charlotte the Perching Detective!
11:00 AM Ages All ages
Charlotte the golden Cocker Spaniel is a trained detective — and she's coming to prove it. Kids hide the scent tins, she finds them every time. Author Kristine Sheppard will be here to read the book that started it all.
Apr 16
Camp Sunshine Kids Yoga — Earth Day Edition $10
with Camp Sunshine
5:00 PM - 7:00 PM Ages 1-10
Stretch, breathe, and celebrate the Earth. Jena from Camp Sunshine Kids Yoga leads two sessions — little ones at 5 PM, bigger kids at 6 — with an Earth Day twist.
Apr 17
Layered Paper Art Workshop $15
6:00 PM - 8:00 PM Ages 12+
Cut, stack, and build — layer by layer, you'll create a paper art piece with real depth and dimension. A hands-on evening workshop inspired by the intricate papercut art of Marina Papercuts. $15 per person.
Apr 18
Storytime with Kellie DuBay Gillis
11:00 AM Ages All ages
A Fairview Park scientist who writes picture books. Two nature stories. Two days before Earth Day. Kellie DuBay Gillis is your neighbor — and she's coming to story time.
Apr 21
Family Classics Book Club
6:00 PM - 7:00 PM Ages 6-12
Join us this month for 'Winnie the Pooh' by A.A. Milne.
Apr 25
Independent Bookstore Day 2026 Free
10:00 AM - 8:00 PM Ages All ages
Story Karaoke runs 11–2. Abby Dosen signs books 11–12:30. Face painting until 1pm. Teen poets at 3:30. The Lakewood Music Academy demos at 4:30. Plus all-day raffle, scavenger hunt, and craft activity. It's our biggest day of the year.
Apr 29
Silhouettes by Chris Casey
1:00 PM - 4:00 PM Ages All ages
A real silhouette artist, right here in the bookstore. Chris Casey cuts your child's profile in minutes — a keepsake that lasts forever. Book your slot ahead of time.
May 2
Parent & Child Painting Class with Ohio City Art House
12:50 PM - 2:00 PM Ages 3+
Grab a brush and paint alongside your little one. Ohio City Art House brings a guided painting class to The Wandering Lantern — no experience needed, just show up and create something together.
May 19
Family Classics Book Club
6:00 PM - 7:00 PM Ages 6-12
Join us this month for 'The Secret Garden' by Frances Hodgson Burnett.
May 21
Camp Sunshine Kids Yoga
5:00 PM - 7:00 PM Ages 1-10
Two yoga sessions, one cozy bookstore. Jena from Camp Sunshine leads Parent & Tot at 5 PM and Kids Yoga at 6 — movement, music, games, and stories.
May 26
Stories, Pretend, and Puppets $150
10:00 AM - 1:00 PM daily Ages Rising kindergarteners
Four mornings of fairy tales, pretend play, and puppet-making at The Wandering Lantern and Wagar Park. Your child heads home with a handmade friend and a story to tell.
Jun 8
Improv, Puppetry, & Performance $135
5:30 PM - 8:30 PM daily Ages Rising 6th–7th graders
A week of summer evenings being loud, silly, and expressive at Wagar Park — then walking into the bookstore to turn it all into a performance. Ends with a showcase Friday night.
Jun 16
Family Classics Book Club
6:00 PM - 7:00 PM Ages 6-12
Join us this month for 'The Wind in the Willows' by Kenneth Grahame.
Aug 18
Family Classics Book Club
6:00 PM - 7:00 PM Ages 6-12
Join us this month for 'Stuart Little' by E.B. White.
Sep 15
Family Classics Book Club
6:00 PM - 7:00 PM Ages 6-12
Join us this month for 'The Penderwicks' by Jeanne Birdsall.
Oct 20
Family Classics Book Club
6:00 PM - 7:00 PM Ages 8-12
Join us this month for 'The Legend of Sleepy Hollow' by Washington Irving.
Nov 17
Family Classics Book Club
6:00 PM - 7:00 PM Ages 8-12
Join us this month for 'Anne of Green Gables' by L.M. Montgomery.
Dec 15
Family Classics Book Club
6:00 PM - 7:00 PM Ages 7-12
Join us this month for 'The Lion, The Witch, and The Wardrobe' by C.S. Lewis.
Dec 31
Saturday Story Time
11:00 AM - 12:00 PM Ages 0-10
Join us every Saturday morning for story time! Two sessions: 11:00am for ages 0-5 and 11:30am for ages 6-10.
No events scheduled for this month. Check back soon for upcoming events!

The Wandering Lantern

"Follow the light, find the wonder"
15729 Madison Ave, Lakewood, OH 44107 · (216) 999-4462
